free_text: A study of the reactions 9Be(He3,n)11C,
7Li(He3,n)9B and 13C(He3,n)15O
10.2 cm x 7.6 cm plastic crystal
Relative error
The absolute cross sections reported in
this paper may be in error as much as 50%.
The principal uncertainty is the approximations that
made in solving the plastic scintillator were
efficiency integrals.
Compilation Produced by Arzamas RFNC-VNIIEF
Last checking has been done.
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
DATA-ERR2 -> ERR-1.
The 9Be targets were produced by evaporating 9Be
metal onto platinum blanks. The uniformity of the
targets were uniform to within 10%.
Uncertainty in the uniformity of the targets

No information about units.
The 13C targets were made by cracking methyl iodide,
enriched to about 60% in 13C, onto heated platinum
blanks. The thickness of the 13C targets are not known,
therefore the cross sections measured with them are
given only in relative units.
No information about source of uncertainty
